## CryptoUtils.EncryptionHelper.deriveKey() method

Derives a key from a password.

**Signature:**

```typescript
deriveKey(password: string, salt: Uint8Array, iterations: number): Promise<Result<Uint8Array>>;
```

Promise&lt;Result&lt;Uint8Array&gt;&gt;
